title: potentilla × zapalowiczi
intro: Potentilla × zapalowiczi, also known as Zapalowicz's potentilla, is a rare and hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × zapalowiczi include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas or infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
